contextBlurb: Washington has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 3 are already enacted. 4 offer incentives or exemptions.

legislation.summary: Delaying the rebasing of the nursing home payment rates to 2028.

legislation.summary: Making improvements to transparency and accountability in the prior authorization determination process.
